attacking_style: Prefers extremely long-range solo efforts (87km documented) from breakaways rather than GC group accelerations. Willing to attack on climbs but shows limited explosive acceleration, compensating with time trial strength and descending confidence.
team_tactics: Appears to operate with significant freedom to hunt stage wins from breakaways rather than supporting protected riders. Limited data on direct team setup for his moves.
terrain_preference: Climbing time trials and long descents after mid-mountain passes are ideal weapons. Struggles on steep, punchy climbs requiring explosive accelerations. Suited to attrition-based climbing rather than sharp gradient changes.
vulnerability: Lacks peak acceleration to sustain counterattacks on steep gradients. Form periodization issues evident (building rather than peaking at Romandie 2022). May struggle in tactical sprint situations from reduced groups.
key_patterns: Exceptional climbing TT ability: 4 seconds behind Geschke at age 19 (2022)
Repeatedly attacks outside podium contention for stage wins in Grand Tours (2021, 2022 Vuelta)
Prefers ultra-long solo efforts over waiting for chase groups, showing TT/descending confidence
Limited explosive acceleration on climbs; initiates counterattacks but cannot sustain them
form_trajectory: neutral: 2022 Romandie showed form building rather than peaking, but still competitive. Vuelta appearance later same year showed willingness to attack, suggesting continued development trajectory for young rider.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17
